phrases.text_local: Scusi, dov'è il parcheggio per le auto, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee doh-VEH eel par-KED-joh per leh OW-toh per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: È fuori dal paese, segua i segnali.
likely_response.pronunciation: È foo-OH-ree DAHL pah-EH-seh seh-GOO-ah EE sehj-NAH-lee
likely_response.translation_en: It is outside the village, follow the signs.

responses.english: It is outside the village, follow the signs.
responses.phonetic: È foo-OH-ree DAHL pah-EH-seh seh-GOO-ah EE sehj-NAH-lee
responses.local: È fuori dal paese, segua i segnali.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, come arrivo al Belvedere per le foto, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KOH-meh ar-REE-voh al bel-veh-DEH-reh per leh FOH-toh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: Go up the road, on the left.

responses.english: Go up the road, on the left.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, a che ora passa il prossimo treno, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, ah keh OH-rah PAS-sah eel PROS-see-moh TREH-noh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: The hours are posted at the entrance.

responses.english: The hours are posted at the entrance.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, avete tavoli liberi per cena, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, ah-VEH-teh TAH-voh-lee LEE-beh-ree per CHEH-nah, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, c'è il Wi-Fi gratuito qui, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, cheh eel WEE-fee grah-TWEE-toh kwee, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove posso assaggiare lo Sciacchetrà, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-vehs POS-soh as-sah-JAH-reh loh shak-keh-TRAH, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: Wine shop in the square, on the right.

responses.english: Wine shop in the square, on the right.
